task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for GoPro HERO11 Black (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $499.00 and wholesale is $349.00. Product features: Action camera with 5.3K video and HyperSmooth 5.0 stabilization. Reference: https://gopro.com/en/us/shop/cameras/hero11-black/CHDHX-111-master.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for GoPro HERO11 Black. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying GoPro HERO11 Black. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
